zh.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Eccleshall於1286年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖時，他的父親Robert de Eccleshall40歲，母親Cecily Foljambe36歲。他於大約1302年與Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾史道頓 哈羅德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eccleshall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Eccleshall (Staffs), Ecclesall (WR Yorks) or Eccleshill (Lancs, WR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Eccleshall was born in 1286, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Eccleshall, was 40 and his mother, Cecily Foljambe, was 36. He married Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall about 1302, in Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in his hometown.

Il a épousé Mrs. Robert d’Eccleshall environ 1302, à Staunton Harold, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Eccleshall(이)가 1286년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Eccleshall(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Foljambe(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1302년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 스타운턴 하로드에서 Mrs. Robert de Eccleshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.
